parts.part_title: The Deep End – Mid-October 2044 (Days prior to arrival)
The Pipeline – Thursday, October 20, 2044 (Transit to NTTR)
The Filing Cabinet – Thursday, October 20, 2044 – ~04:20 (Shift starts in 20 minutes)
First Flight – Mid-October 2044 (Days prior to arrival)
The Transfer – Thursday, October 20, 2044 – 08:00 (Local Spaceport Time)
The Handoff – Thursday, October 20, 2044 – 04:00 (NTTR Local Time)
The Glitch – Thursday, October 20, 2044 – ~04:15 (Shift starts in exactly forty-five minutes)
The Chain of Command – Thursday, October 20, 2044 – ~06:00
The Break – Thursday, October 20, 2044 – ~11:00 (Six hours into the shift)
Wake Up Call – Friday, October 21, 2044 – 01:00 (After sleeping for eight hours)
The Ghost Shift – Friday, October 21, 2044 – 07:00 (Six more hours until shift change)
The Blind Spot – Friday, October 21, 2044 – ~08:00 (During the one-hour meal rotation)
The Ghost Roster – Friday, October 21, 2044 – 10:00 (Two hours later)
The Sanctuary – Friday, October 21, 2044 – 11:00 (With two hours left on the twelve-hour clock)
Off the Clock – Friday, October 21, 2044 – 13:00 (The twelve-hour klaxon finally screamed)
Return to The Sanctuary – Friday, October 21, 2044 – ~13:30 (Setting up camp in the abandoned break room)
The Illusion of Control – Saturday, October 22, 2044 – 05:00 (PDA alarm goes off at 0500 hours)
Clear Parameters – Saturday, October 22, 2044 – ~08:00 (About twenty minutes into the patrol)
The Masterclass – Saturday, October 22, 2044 – 11:00 (Mid-shift PA chime)
The Ping – Saturday, October 22, 2044 – 12:00 (An hour into the second half of the shift)
The Prison Break – Saturday, October 22, 2044 – 17:00 (The twelve-hour klaxon)
Structural Failure – Sunday, October 23, 2044 – 05:00 (PDA vibrates at 0500 hours)
The Deployment – Sunday, October 23, 2044 – ~05:15 (Given twenty minutes to collect gear)
The Transit – Sunday, October 23, 2044 – ~05:30 (Floor detonates; they escape in the shuttle)
The Relic – Monday, October 24, 2044 – 07:15 (Arriving at Outpost Delta 9)
The Blinking Clock – Monday, October 24, 2044 – 07:45 (Wyatt sets the VCR clock to 07:45, mirroring their arrival time)
The Ghost Ship – Monday, October 24, 2044 – ~10:00 (A few more hours pass)
The Broadcast – Monday, October 24, 2044 – ~10:15 (Shortly after checking the command center)
The Strawberry Festival – Monday, October 24, 2044 – ~10:50 (For the first twenty minutes, it was pure trial and error)
The Acceleration – Monday, October 24, 2044 – 12:05 (They hadn't even been out of the engine room for twenty minutes)
Scorched Earth – Monday, October 24, 2044 – ~12:15 (The military broadcast states scorched earth was authorized at 1300 hours on Earth)
An Attempt at Normalcy – Monday, October 24, 2044 – Evening (e.g. ~20:00)
Shedding the Armor – Tuesday, October 25, 2044 – Morning (e.g. ~08:00) (The deep-space morning cycled over the outpost)
The Ghost Ship – Tuesday, October 25, 2044 – ~10:00 (Exactly two hours after breakfast)
The Void – Tuesday, October 25, 2044 – ~10:30 (Dropship is four hours out)
The Ghost Awakens – Tuesday, October 25, 2044 – ~11:15 (Forty-five minutes of absolute agony)
A Vector to Nowhere – Tuesday, October 25, 2044 – ~13:30 (Two hours later after leaving orbit)
The Hubris of Apex – Tuesday, October 25, 2044 – ~14:00 (Yellowstone erupts; broadcast states event occurred at 0915 hours Earth-time)
